---
title: "reprot_parameter_constraint_for_eliciting_a_w"
author: "Daisy Dan Song"
date: "2025-10-05"
output: html_document
---

# initialize
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
  )
rm(list = ls())
library(Dispatching)
library(foreach)
library(magrittr)
library(codetools)
library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)
library(purrr)
library(doParallel)
registerDoParallel()
```

# import estimation equilibrium
```{r}
equilibrium <-
  readRDS(
    file = "output/multihome/make_equilibrium_nationwide_top5_from_data/equilibrium_top5_fringe.rds" %>%
    here::here()
  )
```

# m_w + m_f = 1
```{r}
# Define parameter grids
m_w_grid <- 
  seq(
    1e-4, 
    1 - 1e-10, 
    by = 1e-1
    )
lambda_w_grid <- 
  seq(
    1e-6, 
    3, 
    by = 0.5
    ) 
mu_p_grid <- 
  seq(
    1, 
    40, 
    by = 5
    ) 
mu_ths_grid <- 
  seq(
  1, 
  40, 
  by = 5
  ) 


# Initialize results storage
grid_results <- expand.grid(
  m_w = m_w_grid,
  lambda_w = lambda_w_grid,
  mu_p = mu_p_grid,
  mu_ths = mu_ths_grid
)

instrument_demand <- 
  make_instrument_demand(
    equilibrium = equilibrium
  )

weighting_matrix_demand <- 
  compute_demand_weighting_matrix(
    instrument_demand = instrument_demand
)

grid_results$convergence <- NA
grid_results$first_na_index <- NA
grid_results$valid_solutions <- NA

# Perform grid search
results <- 
  foreach(
    idx = 1:nrow(grid_results),
    .combine = "rbind",
    .packages = 
      c(
        "foreach", 
        "magrittr", 
        "Dispatching"
        )
  ) %dopar% {
    
    current_m_w <- grid_results$m_w[idx]
    current_lambda_w <- grid_results$lambda_w[idx]
    current_mu_p <- grid_results$mu_p[idx]
    current_mu_ths <- grid_results$mu_ths[idx]
    current_m_f <- 1 - current_m_w
    
    equilibrium$parameter$m_w <- current_m_w
    equilibrium$parameter$m_f <- current_m_f
    equilibrium$parameter$lambda_w <- current_lambda_w
    equilibrium$parameter$mu_p <- current_mu_p
    equilibrium$parameter$mu_ths <- current_mu_ths

    tryCatch({
      check_result <- 
        foreach(
          t = seq_along(equilibrium$endogenous),
          .combine = rbind,
          .packages = c(
            "foreach",
            "magrittr",
            "Dispatching"
          )
        ) %dopar% {
          a_w_t <- 
            foreach(
              j = seq_along(equilibrium$endogenous[[t]]),
              .combine = rbind
            ) %do% {
              a_w_tj <- 
                compute_demand_shock_nleqslv_a_w_tj(
                  m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
                  m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
                  lambda_w = equilibrium$parameter$lambda_w,
                  size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
                  size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
                  mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
                  w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w,
                  s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f,
                  s_w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_w,
                  method_s_w = equilibrium$constant$method_s_w,
                  margin = equilibrium$constant$margin,
                  quadrature_size = equilibrium$constant$quadrature_size,
                  tol = equilibrium$constant$tol
                )
              return(a_w_tj)
            }
          return(a_w_t)
        }
      
      # Check for NA values
      has_na <- any(is.na(check_result))
      convergence_status <- ifelse(has_na, 0, 1)  # 1 = success, 0 = failure
      
      # Return result for this parameter combination
      data.frame(
        idx = idx,
        m_w = current_m_w,
        lambda_w = current_lambda_w,
        mu_p = current_mu_p,
        mu_ths = current_mu_ths,
        m_f = current_m_f,
        convergence = convergence_status,
        has_na = has_na,
        min_s_w = 
          ifelse(
            has_na, 
            NA, 
            min(
              check_result, 
              na.rm = TRUE
              )
            ),
        max_s_w = 
          ifelse(
            has_na,
            NA, 
            max(
              check_result, 
              na.rm = TRUE
              )
            ),
        mean_s_w = ifelse(has_na, NA, mean(check_result, na.rm = TRUE))
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      # Return error result
      data.frame(
        idx = idx,
        m_w = current_m_w,
        lambda_w = current_lambda_w,
        mu_p = current_mu_p,
        mu_ths = current_mu_ths,
        m_f = current_m_f,
        convergence = 0,
        has_na = TRUE,
        min_s_w = NA,
        max_s_w = NA,
        mean_s_w = NA,
        error_msg = as.character(e$message)
      )
    })
  }

# Display summary statistics
cat("Grid Search Summary:\n")
cat("Total parameter combinations tested:", nrow(results), "\n")
cat("Successful convergences:", sum(results$convergence, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Failed convergences:", sum(results$convergence == 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Success rate:", round(mean(results$convergence, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2), "%\n\n")

# Display the best performing parameter combinations
successful_results <- results[results$convergence == 1 & !is.na(results$convergence), ]

if(nrow(successful_results) > 0) {
  cat("Top 10 successful parameter combinations:\n")
  top_results <- successful_results[order(-successful_results$mean_s_w), ][1:min(10, nrow(successful_results)), ]
  print(top_results)
} else {
  cat("No successful parameter combinations found.\n")
}

```
# The first appearance of NA
```{r}

first_na_row <- which(apply(is.na(results), 1, any))[1]
first_na_row
```
